title: Allegation
description: A single allegation of misconduct made against one officer within a complaint — the finest-grain CCRB accountability record. Canonical schema reconciling the 'Civilian Complaint Review Board: Allegations Against Police Officers' dataset (6xgr-kwjq, 18 columns) and the Data Transparency Initiative allegations dashboard. Joins to Complaint on Complaint Id and to PoliceOfficer on Tax ID.

allegationRecordIdentity.description: Unique allegation record identifier ('Allegation Record Identity') — primary key.

complaintOfficerNumber.description: Officer sequence number within the complaint ('Complaint Officer Number').

allegation.description: Specific allegation ('Allegation') — e.g. Physical force, Stop, Frisk, Threat of arrest.

ccrbInvestigationRecommendation.description: CCRB Investigations Division recommendation ('CCRB Investigations Division Recommendation').

nypdAllegationDisposition.description: NYPD's disposition of the allegation ('NYPD Allegation Disposition').

officerRankAtIncident.description: Officer rank at incident ('Officer Rank At Incident').

officerRankAbbreviationAtIncident.description: Rank abbreviation at incident ('Officer Rank Abbreviation At Incident').

officerCommandAtIncident.description: Officer command at incident ('Officer Command At Incident').

officerDaysOnForceAtIncident.description: Officer tenure in days at time of incident ('Officer Days On Force At Incident').

victimRaceLegacy.description: Legacy victim race coding ('Victim / Alleged Victim Race (Legacy)').
